title: tragacantha philippiana
intro: Tragacantha philippiana, also known as Tagasaste, is a perennial legume tree native to New Zealand. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the body. The health benefits of Tragacantha philippiana include its ability to support heart health, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be dried and used as a tea, or made into a powder for use in supplements or added to food products.
